title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 22 - 2017: Boulderome Castles in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog recapping his day: dealing with bills and a new credit card, car light repairs, troubleshooting Dreamweaver CSS files, and working on a 'free audio history box' project for his website. He also describes the castle images he used as video backgrounds, referencing real castles including one near the Black Sea/Turkey strait, Lincoln Cathedral, and Warwick Castle, and discusses a hypothetical citadel layout he's designing on the hillside behind the Flatirons in Boulder.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds the updated version confusing and needs tutorials to relearn it
Knows he needs to start exercising but keeps putting it off until he burns out on current projects
Enthusiastically imagines building a small neighborhood in the style of a historical citadel behind the first Flatiron

entities: Chris (mentioned in passing re: bios page)

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-log. I just had a shower.
It's 1 o'clock in the morning on the 23rd, so this is the V-log for the 22nd.
I got up kind of early, like 10.
And today I did lots of different things.
It was like, I don't know, it was confusing, stressful days.
I had to figure out all my bills. I lost my card.
So I had to pay all my bills with a new card.
Maybe I'll get a new card, and then it's not coming in.
I didn't order it for the third time.
And then I called the car people.
They called me. They couldn't fix my light, so they have to just put a hole in the system in there.
But I had them do it so I could make my car more appealing because that's pretty essential, the mid-camping light in there.
So it's going to be $140, but my mom's going to help me out with that.
Yeah, so today I spent a lot of time with tech support trying to figure out Adobe Dreamweaver, the CSS files, all the different fonts and stuff.
I built all those with the old Dreamweaver with my old computer, and I haven't figured it out.
They changed it, and it's really confusing.
So I have to do the tutorials and stuff.
I want to create new fonts, new CSS stuff.
But I've got to be sober for that.
And I was working on just – oh, no, I forgot my background.
So, okay, today I was working on my free audio history books, UK.
So, yeah, I think I'll work on the free audio history books for another few days until I burn out on it.
You know, that'll get it to the next level, and then I'll go and do the education page and other surface-level stuff.
I still have some stuff in the Bible's page to do, bike race to the Bible's pages.
So just do as much as I can before I break down and have to start exercising.
I was having really bad asthma the last few days where the asthma was starting to, like, bother me all day every day,
Even though I'm doing the Adverent inhaler.
So if that continues, I'd have to quit this whole lifestyle and get healthy.
Oh, let me talk about the video.
So in the background, I was doing castles, castles in Boulder Room.
I got castles that are real-life, real-life castles.
And then I put them, situate them up there in the flat ends of the mountains.
The first castle that we looked at was the big castle across the Straits of Dardanelles,
Where you get from the Black Sea to the Mediterranean Sea, right near, like, Turkey and Turkey,
Where it's only, like, a half mile or something across.
And they have two big castles that they could shoot at boats if they tried to cross, and that was the big castle.
And then the second castle, you had Lincoln Cathedral, which was the first one with the big tower.
That was the highest building in the world after the pyramids.
And then there was another one, oh, I can't remember.
And then Warwick Castle was the big one up on the side.
I had another castle on, uh, Haystack Mountain, but it disappeared.
Yeah.
And then at the very end of the video, I don't know if we'll make it there on this one.
This wasn't the best video for background because I was just kind of wandering around.
I'll move on next time.
But I ended it with, uh, this area on the top of a hill behind the flat iron, first flat iron.
That's exactly a half mile around because that's, or a half kilometer, 500 meters,
Because that's what your typical citadel area is inside of the city.
It would be like the castle inside of the four kilometer wall of the city.
Um, and then I put, and then I put, uh, 380 foot diameter circumference areas in there, you know, the same size as the lots here in Boulder.
So, um, to build a little neighborhood up there.
Um, so, um, so tomorrow I'll get going on free audio history books all day long.
Um, maybe they'll finish my car tomorrow, maybe not.
If they do, I'll get going on selling the car.
I did work a little bit on the webpage.
If I don't find all my paperwork, um, it's a bummer.
But I heard that you can type in your bin and it'll, it'll bring up all, all the work history that you had done on the car.
So, plus I can use YouTube to prove, you know, when I had stuff in place because I was talking about it in there.
Um, okay.
I think that's enough talking for today.
Five minutes.
Peace out.
